title: Spicy Chilli Beef Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap filled with tender beef, crunchy vegetables, and a hint of Mexican spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook for 3-4 minutes until translucent.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the beef strips and cook for 5-6 minutes until browned and cooked through.
Add the diced chilli, cumin, and paprika. Stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the beef mixture onto the center of each wrap.
Top with shredded cheese, salsa, and any desired toppings.
Optional: Grill or pan-fry the wraps for a crispy exterior and a melty interior.
